description: Visualizes inequalities on a number line by parsing and shading solution regions. Supports custom label text.
utility: Automatically displays simple and compound inequalities with flexible inequality string syntax and optional labels

arguments.name: numberLine
arguments.description: The number line to visualize the inequality on

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Optional color using c(colorName). Defaults to blue

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Custom label text (must be the second string, after the inequality string)

alternates.description: Parse and shade a simple inequality like 'x > 2' or 'x <= 5'
Parse compound inequalities like '2 < x <= 5' with mixed endpoint types
Custom label text replacing auto-generated interval notation

examples.expression: N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); I = ineq(N, '2 < x <= 5', c(blue), "Solution set")
